title: NIT-K to offer online M.Tech in Signal Processing and AI
description: NIT-K launches an online M.Tech in Signal Processing and AI for 2026-27, enhancing access to quality education.

title: Blackmagic AI Announced the Next OpenRouter Alternative
description: The OpenRouter alternative starts at $10, is drop-in compatible with the OpenAI SDK, and routes to 13 providers from a single prepaid balance.

title: Oppo rolls out ColorOS 16 May 2026 update with AI Mind Pilot, improved Live Space, and more
description: Oppo has announced the rollout of the ColorOS 16 May 2026 update for the Find and Reno series smartphones. The update is headlined by Live Space, which is now smooth and smart to interact with, offering an immersive, responsive, and refined lock-screen experience with fluid animations, while the capsule-style notifications display real-time updates through a clean, distraction-free interface. The ColorOS 16 update also brings updated O+ Connect, which now allows seamless cross-platform file sharing and connectivity between Oppo and Apple devices. Additionally, the ColorOS...

title: Amazon orders AI animated shows including a KPop Demon Hunters lookalike, drawing fan backlash
description: Amazon Prime Video ordered three AI-generated animation series, drawing accusations that the shows copy existing characters without permission. One creator said watching her design become an "AI puppet" felt like "having my intestines pulled out."
